channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: GOP leaders rush to quell conservative rebellion as House floor remains stalled
item.description: House GOP leaders face a critical test as they attempt to end a conservative revolt that has paralyzed the House floor for nearly a month.

item.title: Michigan Democratic Senate candidate squirms after CNN reveals his 'defund the police' record
U.S. Senate and key White House officials continue tributes to Senator Lindsey Graham
NY Times' Swan tells Newsmax: 2024 Trump coalition will be hard to replicate
item.description: New York Times investigative reporter Jonathan Swan told Newsmax on Monday that President Donald Trump's ability to unite competing factions of the Republican...
